title: SMALLHUD
description: SMALLHUD makes your Minecraft HUD/GUI smaller and cleaner. Now scales hotbar, health, armor, food, XP  to 75% and scoreboard to 50% <3
body:
**SMALLHUD** is a mod that makes Minecraft HUD smaller and cleaner. 

Now scales hotbar, health, armor, food, XP to 75% and scoreboard to 50%.

Perfect if u want your GUI scaled down <3 

Made on 1.21.11 version but should work on 1.21 and higher!

![How It Looks with SMALLHUD Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76d73bdd14d43fd5011e511c555aeb531839cd35.png)

![Comparison - with SMALLHUD Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbf102aa4bdb5f66f8263e1cd1f7ce91bab77b09.png)

![Comparison - without SMALLHUD Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5540e26a18f4e142c0cbd9e0a3118e897f5033e7.png)

If u want to request code feel free to dm on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/mJNFhwTK)
